Dokos is available on DigitalOcean marketplace
Dokos - Free and open-source business applications
Dokos is a free and open-source applications for businesses
Free and open-source applications to power your business
Dokos is an adaptation of ERPNext

Powerful features to go from zero
to the moon
Dokos is a complete enterprise resource planning software
Everything in Dokos can be fully customized to tailor your business needs
Dodock is the full web framework powering Dokos and its eco-system of applications
Everything in Dokos is accessible through an API to allow any type of external integration
Dokos is delivered with a set of business intelligence tools to create value out of your data
Dokos is a free and open-source software and will always remain
You are guaranteed to be completely independant from a single software vendor
Your are free to use it... completely for free. We also provide paid services if you need help to host or use Dokos
Dokos is based on the wonderful Frappe and ERPNext softwares and their ecosystem of applications
